title: Business Intelligence Analyst
company_name: UrBox - Công ty Cổ phần Tiếp Thị Số Tô Quà
location: Hồ Chí Minh
job_description: KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: 1. Data Management & Department Head Reporting Design standard weekly, monthly, and quarterly reports for revenue streams such as: commissions, management fees, unused revenue, total transaction value, gross profit, customer pipeline, usage rate, co-branded card programs, etc. Review and reconcile data across systems: CRM, invoicing, finance, and product usage. Standardize KPI definitions company-wide: qualified leads, deal closing rate, transaction completion time, breakage rate, offer usage rate, etc. Set up and automate visual reporting systems for the CEO and relevant departments. Establish early warning systems for abnormal growth indicator trends. 2. Program Effectiveness Evaluation Build ROI measurement frameworks for programs such as: point redemption, e-gift vouchers, co-branded card promotions, and retailer co-sponsored campaigns. Analyze pre- and post-launch program effectiveness: including revenue uplift, offer usage rate, customer acquisition cost/lifetime value (CAC/LTV), and net new user growth. Identify success or inefficiency drivers: by industry, channel, messaging, user behavior, and technical readiness. Recommend A/B testing plans, budget optimization, offer assortment, and deployment models. 3. Sales Performance Measurement Develop individual performance dashboards for the sales team, covering: number of meetings, proposals sent, CRM adherence, deal closing rate, revenue, and total transaction value. Analyze performance by customer segment: industry, region, contract value, onboarding time. Propose incentive policies based on actual profit contribution and debt collection capability. Participate in standardizing sales process stages and evaluation criteria for each stage. 4. Industry Reports Publishing Compile in-depth industry reports (Banking, Insurance, FMCG, etc.): including behavioral data, case studies, and benchmark metrics. Standardize documentation structure: executive summary, key findings, and visual data appendix. Collaborate to publish bilingual (Vietnamese – English) versions for sales teams, strategic partners, and B2B communications. 5. Other tasks as assigned by direct manager.
job_requirements: REQUIREMENTS: Education:  Bachelor’s degree in Economics, Business Administration, Finance, Statistics, or related fields. Professional major: Proficient in advanced Excel or Google Sheets and basic to intermediate SQL (including join, window functions). Experience with at least one data visualization tool: Looker Studio, Power BI, Metabase, or Google Data Studio. Strong understanding of business metrics: GMV, margin, breakage, CAC, LTV, customer scoring, etc. 2nd language ability:  Proficient in Vietnamese and English for writing and presenting technical reports. Related experiences: 3–6 years of experience in Business Analysis, Sales Operations, Growth, or Strategy Consulting. Preference for candidates with experience in: Fintech, Loyalty programs, Payments, FMCG. Essential capabilities: Strong system and logical thinking, deep analytical skills. Proficient in writing whitepapers, extracting insights from data, and clearly presenting complex information. Effective collaboration and professional communication across departments. Proactive, detail-oriented while maintaining strategic oversight. Additional notes: Preferred skills: Python (pandas), knowledge of CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot), analytics tools (GA4, AppsFlyer), or experience in performance measurement system development. High learning agility and adaptability to a fast-paced, multitasking environment.

job_description: Planning Manager 1. Scope of Responsibility Own and lead the end-to-end Demand & Supply Planning function , ensuring alignment between market demand, commercial strategy, and supply capabilities. Drive the  S&OP / Integrated Business Planning (IBP) process , enabling cross-functional alignment across Commercial, Finance, Operations Establish and continuously enhance  forecasting and supply planning frameworks  based on market trends, business strategies, and historical demand patterns within the pharmaceutical–cosmetics industry. Oversee  portfolio lifecycle planning , including new product introductions, product transitions, and SKU rationalization. Ensure planning governance and compliance with  pharma–cosmetics regulatory requirements, internal policies, and operational standards . 2. Planning Strategy & Execution Challenge and validate  commercial demand assumptions , driving improved forecast accuracy and demand visibility. Lead structured  Demand Review and S&OP cycles , ensuring timely and data-driven decision making across the organization. Develop and manage  supply planning strategies  to ensure supply readiness while maintaining optimal inventory health. Identify potential  supply–demand risks and operational constraints , driving scenario planning and mitigation strategies. Continuously strengthen  planning processes, tools, and governance  to enhance supply chain agility and transparency. 3. Business Analysis & Strategic Insights Deliver  advanced planning analysis and actionable business insights  to support leadership decision-making. Monitor and drive improvement in  planning performance metrics  including Forecast Accuracy, Bias, SMOS, and inventory health indicators. Conduct  scenario modelling and demand-supply simulations  to evaluate business risks and support strategic planning. Maintain clear visibility across  demand, supply, and inventory performance  through structured reporting and analytics. 4. Leadership & Functional Excellence Lead and develop the  Demand & Supply Planning capability , establishing strong planning discipline and accountability across the organization. Foster strong  cross-functional collaboration  to enable integrated planning and operational alignment. Champion a culture of  ownership, data-driven decision making, and continuous improvement  within the planning function. Drive adoption and effective use of  planning systems, analytics tools, and data governance frameworks  to strengthen supply chain visibility and performance Supply Chain Analysis       1. Supply Chain Diagnostics & Bottleneck Analysis Conduct deep-dive performance analytics across planning, procurement, and logistics to identify root causes of inefficiency. Quantify business impact of recurring issues (forecast deviation, high inventory aging, lead-time variance, transportation ).  Develop simulation and “what-if” scenario models to recommend corrective actions and process improvements that enhance operational reliability and cost performance.      2. Sales & Trend Analytics – Scenario Planning  Integrate sell-out, promotion, and market trend data to identify demand patterns and predict business risks. Build dynamic “what-if” models combining commercial assumptions and supply constraints to support proactive decision-making. Partner with Commercial and Finance teams to ensure scenario outcomes align with business targets and supply capabilities.     3. Dashboard Building & Data Automation Design interactive dashboards via Looker Studio / Power BI to visualize key metrics (FA, OTIF, DIO, SLOB, Working Capital).  Automate data consolidation from ERP and Sale systems to ensure real-time visibility and reporting accuracy. Translate data into business insights and actionable recommendations for daily operations of SCM Department , Other Departments in monthly S&OP or management review meetings.      4. Continuous Improvement & Transformation Projects Lead and support cross-functional initiatives aimed at improving forecast accuracy, inventory turnover, and process efficiency. Partner closely with IT /Strategy teams to implement supply chain transformation projects such as ERP enhancement, data warehouse integration, and predictive analytics models. Drive continuous improvement mindset and embed data analytics culture across the organization Act as a key stakeholder in digitalization initiatives, ensuring analytical solutions are scalable, accurate, and aligned with business Drive continuous improvement mindset and embed data analytics culture across the organization      5. KPIs: 85% scenario simulation reliability, reducing reactive re-planning by 40%. At least 3 scenarios for each situation  Built real-time Locker/ Excel Visualize /Power BI dashboards integrating ERP/sales data, cutting manual reporting time 100% Partnered with Internal and External Department to deploy predictive analytics and data warehouse integration, enabling 70% faster S&OP/ daily Operations decision-making.  Delivered/ Reduced monthly / annual cost optimization via root-cause analytics and supply chain process redesign.

job_description: The DQCO performs independent, real-time oversight of all GMP activities at the facility, without direct involvement in production or routine quality release (QA release / QC). The role ensures that aseptic compliance, data integrity, environmental monitoring, and contamination control are maintained to the highest regulatory standards across all production shifts. Data Integrity Oversight & System Compliance GMP Records Verification: Cross-reference batch production records (BPR), log books, and actual instrument/system data. Ensure all GMP records comply with ALCOA+ principles: Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneously recorded, Original, Accurate (plus Complete, Consistent, Enduring, and Available). Cross-check recorded data against actual on-floor activities. Audit Trail & Electronic Systems Review: Review audit trails of LIMS, MES, SCADA, and other GMP data systems. Detect indicators such as back-dated entries, unauthorised corrections, or missing data. Verify system access controls and data modification history. DI Investigation & Training: Support Data Integrity awareness training and education for GMP personnel. Initiate a formal Data Integrity investigation within 24 hours of detecting a breach.
job_requirements: Education Bachelor's degree in Pharmacy, Microbiology, Chemistry, Biotechnology, Chemical Engineering, or a related science discipline. Postgraduate qualification or specialised GMP certification is an advantage. Work Experience Experience in a GMP environment; sterile manufacturing experience is strongly preferred. Experience in Aseptic oversight, Environmental Monitoring, or QA/QC roles is a significant advantage. Technical Knowledge cGMP: 21 CFR Part 210/211, EU GMP, WHO GMP. Data Integrity – ALCOA+ (FDA, MHRA, WHO Guidance). Aseptic Process Simulation (Media Fill). ICH Q9 (Quality Risk Management) and root cause investigation tools (RCA, 5-Why, Fishbone). Skills Detail observation skills, accurate and contemporaneous documentation. Audit skills, effective questioning, and risk assessment. Written reporting skills in both Vietnamese and English. Teamwork and cross-departmental communication skills. Proficient in Microsoft Office; Power BI / advanced Excel is an advantage. Personal Attributes High integrity, independent judgment, unwavering under production schedule pressure. Meticulous, critical thinking, and strong compliance mindset. Willing to work shift-based schedules including nights and weekends as required.

Thu thập và phân tích yêu cầu, hoàn thiện tài liệu phân tích, SIT và đôn đốc việc hoàn thành UAT của nghiệp vụ cho các yêu cầu phòng Quản trị dữ liệu tài chính thực hiện phát triển. Xây dựng BRD, tham gia UAT và kiểm soát tiến độ triển khai cho các yêu cầu của phòng được khối CNTT và khối Dữ liệu phát triển. 3. Tư vấn, hỗ trợ Tư vấn, hỗ trợ các đơn vị trong Khối Tài chính về giải pháp khai thác dữ liệu/báo cáo. Tối ưu hóa quy trình khai thác dữ liệu phục vụ báo cáo của khối. 4. Quản lý yêu cầu phát triển Phân loại yêu cầu phát triển về dữ liệu và hệ thống tài chính từ các phòng ban trong Khối Tài chính. Phối hợp với Khối CNTT và Khối Dữ liệu trong quá trình ước tính nguồn lực và theo dõi tiến độ phát triển. Đầu mối phối hợp cùng nghiệp vụ đôn đốc Khối CNTT và Khối Dữ liệu đáp ứng yêu cầu. 5. Dự án Tham gia các dự án của Khối Tài chính và của Ngân hàng có liên quan đến dữ liệu và báo cáo tài chính. Tham gia xây dựng yêu cầu cho phần dữ liệu tài chính, đánh giá các ảnh hưởng của dự án đến dữ liệu tài chính. Phối hợp cùng nghiệp vụ thực hiện UAT các yêu cầu thay đổi theo kế hoạch. 6. Phát triển con người Tham gia đào tạo, chia sẻ nội bộ phòng và khối. Phối hợp với các thành viên trong phòng thực hiện tài liệu hóa kiến thức và cập nhật tài liệu cho thành viên mới. 7. Khác Đề xuất các giải pháp nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả công việc. Thực hiện các công việc khác theo sự phân công của Trưởng phòng.
job_requirements: 1. Trình độ đào tạo (Educational Qualifications) Trình độ chuyên môn: Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành Kinh tế, Ngân hàng, Kế toán hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan. 2. Kiến thức / Chuyên môn có liên quan (Relevant Knowledge / Expertise) Am hiểu hoạt động kinh doanh và các sản phẩm, dịch vụ của ngân hàng. Am hiểu các quy định của pháp luật và Ngân hàng Nhà nước trong lĩnh vực ngân hàng, đầu tư tài chính. Có kiến thức sâu về ngân hàng, tài chính; phân tích kinh doanh, phân tích tài chính, thị trường vốn, trao đổi tiền tệ, kế toán quản trị, hệ thống thông tin và cơ sở dữ liệu ngân hàng. 3. Kỹ năng (Skills) Tin học: Thành thạo tin học văn phòng. Ngoại ngữ (Tiếng Anh): Có khả năng giao tiếp và làm việc bằng tiếng Anh. 4. Kinh nghiệm liên quan (Relevant Experience) Có ít nhất 6–8 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực tài chính quản trị tại ngân hàng. Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm về kiểm toán, kế toán tổng hợp, thông tin báo cáo, kế hoạch ngân sách, phân tích kinh doanh – tài chính trong hệ thống ngân hàng và yêu thích công việc liên quan đến dữ liệu. 5. Năng lực cần có (Required Competencies) Khả năng nắm bắt công việc nhanh; quản lý, sắp xếp và xử lý công việc một cách khoa học. Thành thạo các phần mềm tính toán, phân tích số liệu; có khả năng làm việc tốt với dữ liệu. Kỹ năng tổng hợp, phân tích và trình bày báo cáo tốt; có khả năng tư vấn về cơ chế ghi nhận kết quả kinh doanh và các chiều phân tích dữ liệu. Khả năng làm việc độc lập, phối hợp làm việc nhóm và quản lý nhóm hiệu quả. Kỹ năng giao tiếp, đàm phán và thuyết phục tốt. Có khả năng hoạch định công việc, tinh thần trách nhiệm cao.
